title: helia viscosa
intro: Helia viscosa, also known as sticky helia or sticky stick, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helia viscosa include relief from fever, headache, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, making it a valuable herb for wound healing and skin care. Helia viscosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
